name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 8 Apr 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": v6.97"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Minor Changes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"You can now set up a banner to appear on managed checkout, to show additional instructions or notices to customers. This can be found in the "},{"text":"Webstore","bold":true},{"text":" > "},{"text":"Checkout Settings","bold":true},{"text":" page."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Product SKU can be edited or changed on an RMA again."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where orders paid with Apple or Google pay automatically went on-hold, instead of approved."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
